memberdef.argsstring: (struct sd_card *card, struct sdio_func *func, enum sdio_func_num num)
memberdef.name: sdio_init_func

detaileddescription.para:
Initializes SDIO card function. The card function will not be enabled, but after this call returns the SDIO function structure can be used to read and write data from the card.
func
function structure to initialize
card
SD card to enable function on
num
function number to initialize
0
function was initialized successfully
-EIO
I/O error

Enables SDIO card function. sdio_init_func must be called to initialized the function structure before enabling it in the card.
func
function to enable
0
function was enabled successfully
-ETIMEDOUT
card I/O timed out
-EIO
I/O error

briefdescription.para: Set block size of SDIO function.

detaileddescription.para:
Set desired block size for SDIO function, used by block transfers to SDIO registers.
func
function to set block size for
bsize
block size
0
block size was set
-EINVAL
unsupported/invalid block size
-EIO
I/O error

Reads byte from SDIO register
func
function to read from
reg
register address to read from
val
filled with byte value read from register
0
read succeeded
-EBUSY
card is busy with another request
-ETIMEDOUT
card read timed out
-EIO
I/O error

Writes byte to SDIO register
func
function to write to
reg
register address to write to
write_val
value to write to register
0
write succeeded
-EBUSY
card is busy with another request
-ETIMEDOUT
card write timed out
-EIO
I/O error

memberdef.argsstring: (struct sdio_func *func, uint32_t reg, uint8_t write_val, uint8_t *read_val)
memberdef.name: sdio_rw_byte

briefdescription.para: Write byte to SDIO register, and read result.

detaileddescription.para:
Writes byte to SDIO register, and reads the register after write
func
function to write to
reg
register address to write to
write_val
value to write to register
read_val
filled with value read from register
0
write succeeded
-EBUSY
card is busy with another request
-ETIMEDOUT
card write timed out
-EIO
I/O error

memberdef.argsstring: (struct sdio_func *func, uint32_t reg, uint8_t *data, uint32_t len)
memberdef.name: sdio_read_fifo

detaileddescription.para:
Reads bytes from SDIO register, treating it as a fifo. Reads will all be done from same address.
func
function to read from
reg
register address of fifo
data
filled with data read from fifo
len
length of data to read from card
0
read succeeded
-EBUSY
card is busy with another request
-ETIMEDOUT
card read timed out
-EIO
I/O error

memberdef.argsstring: (struct sdio_func *func, uint32_t reg, uint8_t *data, uint32_t len)
memberdef.name: sdio_write_fifo

detaileddescription.para:
Writes bytes to SDIO register, treating it as a fifo. Writes will all be done to same address.
func
function to write to
reg
register address of fifo
data
data to write to fifo
len
length of data to write to card
0
write succeeded
-EBUSY
card is busy with another request
-ETIMEDOUT
card write timed out
-EIO
I/O error

memberdef.argsstring: (struct sdio_func *func, uint32_t reg, uint8_t *data, uint32_t blocks)
memberdef.name: sdio_read_blocks_fifo

detaileddescription.para:
Reads blocks from SDIO register, treating it as a fifo. Reads will all be done from same address.
func
function to read from
reg
register address of fifo
data
filled with data read from fifo
blocks
number of blocks to read from fifo
0
read succeeded
-EBUSY
card is busy with another request
-ETIMEDOUT
card read timed out
-EIO
I/O error

memberdef.argsstring: (struct sdio_func *func, uint32_t reg, uint8_t *data, uint32_t blocks)
memberdef.name: sdio_write_blocks_fifo

detaileddescription.para:
Writes blocks from SDIO register, treating it as a fifo. Writes will all be done to same address.
func
function to write to
reg
register address of fifo
data
data to write to fifo
blocks
number of blocks to write to fifo
0
write succeeded
-EBUSY
card is busy with another request
-ETIMEDOUT
card write timed out
-EIO
I/O error

memberdef.argsstring: (struct sdio_func *func, uint32_t reg, uint8_t *data, uint32_t len)
memberdef.name: sdio_read_addr

briefdescription.para: Copy bytes from an SDIO card.

detaileddescription.para:
Copies bytes from an SDIO card, starting from provided address.
func
function to read from
reg
register address to start copy at
data
buffer to copy data into
len
length of data to read
0
read succeeded
-EBUSY
card is busy with another request
-ETIMEDOUT
card read timed out
-EIO
I/O error

memberdef.argsstring: (struct sdio_func *func, uint32_t reg, uint8_t *data, uint32_t len)
memberdef.name: sdio_write_addr

briefdescription.para: Copy bytes to an SDIO card.

detaileddescription.para: Copies bytes to an SDIO card, starting from provided address.

parameterdescription.para: register address to start copy at
card is busy with another request
